notes: tested on Lutris 4.16, some scenes need to be skipped with ENTER, 75fps on HIGH settings /adaptive sync AOC LCD/
title: The Outer Worlds

notes:
To get the game to launch, you need media foundation support added. This can be done by grabbing the zip from GitHub: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install 

After doing that, open a terminal in that directory and execute the mf-install.sh for your user, example:
 WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/751440/pfx" ./install-mf.sh

The game runs amazingly well. Highly recommend to all.
title: The Outer Worlds

notes:
Requires https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install to display cutscenes and their subtitles.

Requires DXVK to render correctly, particularly in character creation.
title: The Outer Worlds

notes: The game worked perfectly after using (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install) for install Media Foundation. After downloading, open the terminal and enter the following command replacing it with your information: WINEPREFIX="/home/your name/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/606880/pfx" ./install-mf.sh
title: The Outer Worlds

notes: Work really well after tweaking with: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
